message:
🐛 Eliminate visual flickering during data refreshes (#791)

Replace full DOM swap patterns with in-place updates:
- StatsOverview: always render StatBlock with isLoading prop instead of
  swapping between SkeletonStatBlock and StatBlock components
- UnifiedStatBlock: always render same layout with pulse animation
  instead of returning different JSX tree when loading
- CardWrapper: only apply border pulse during initial skeleton display,
  not during background refreshes (RefreshCw icon is sufficient)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
